languages.text: "Похоже, Себериан фон Валанциус и впрямь был стерт из официальных хроник. Любопытно, что за деяния послужили тому причиной... Надеюсь, когда машинный дух древнего когитатора Даргонуса прольет свет на эту тайну, нам не придется прилагать усилия, чтобы вновь предать узнанное забвению, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Похоже, Себериан фон Валанциус и впрямь был одним стерт из официальных хроник. Любопытно, что за деяния послужили тому причиной... Надеюсь, когда машинный дух древнего когитатора Даргонуса прольет свет на эту тайну, нам не придется прилагать усилия, чтобы вновь предать узнанное забвению, Лорд-капитан".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum_MB

languages.text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Похоже, Себериан фон Валанциус и впрямь был стерт из официальных хроник. Любопытно, что за деяния послужили тому причиной... Надеюсь, когда машинный дух древнего когитатора Даргонуса прольет свет на эту тайну, нам не придется прилагать усилия, чтобы вновь предать узнанное забвению, Лорд-капитан".

I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

"It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

"It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

languages.text: “看来塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯确实是被从官方编年史中抹去的那个人。我很想知道，究竟是什么事才能招致这种后果……我由衷希望，等达戈努斯那台古老沉思者的机魂揭开这谜底时，我们也无须将得知的一切全部掩埋，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “看来塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯确实是被从官方编年史中抹去的那个人。我很想知道，究竟是什么事才能招致这种后果……我由衷希望，等达戈努斯那台古老沉思者的机魂揭开这谜底时，我们也无须将得知的一切全部掩埋，舰长大人。”

languages.text: «Parece que, en efecto, Seberian von Valancius fue borrado de las crónicas oficiales. Me pregunto qué fechoría habría cometido para justificar tal medida... Espero que no debamos también nosotros relegar al olvido lo que descubramos cuando el espíritu máquina del viejo cogitador de Dargonus arroje luz sobre este misterio, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Parece que, en efecto, Seberian von Valancius fue borrado de las crónicas oficiales. Me pregunto qué fechoría habría cometido para justificar tal medida... Espero que no debamos también nosotros relegar al olvido lo que descubramos cuando el espíritu máquina del viejo cogitador de Dargonus arroje luz sobre este misterio, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: « Il semble en effet que Seberian von Valancius soit l'individu effacé des chroniques officielles. Je me demande ce qu'il a fait pour qu'une telle mesure soit prise... J'espère que, lorsque l'esprit de la machine de l'ancien cogitateur de Dargonus nous en apprendra plus sur ce mystère, nous ne serons pas également contraints d'oublier toutes ces informations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Il semble en effet que Seberian von Valancius soit l'individu effacé des chroniques officielles. Je me demande ce qu'il a fait pour qu'une telle mesure soit prise... J'espère que, lorsque l'esprit de la machine de l'ancien cogitateur de Dargonus nous en apprendra plus sur ce mystère, nous ne serons pas également contraints d'oublier toutes ces informations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: "Offenbar wurde Seberian von Valancius tatsächlich aus den offiziellen Chroniken getilgt. Ich frage mich, was er angestellt hat ... Ich hoffe, wenn der Maschinengeist des alten Cogitators auf Dargonus Licht in dieses Geheimnis bringt, müssen wir das, was wir erfahren, nicht auch in die Obhut des Vergessens geben, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Offenbar wurde Seberian von Valancius tatsächlich aus den offiziellen Chroniken getilgt. Ich frage mich, was er angestellt hat ... Ich hoffe, wenn der Maschinengeist des alten Cogitators auf Dargonus Licht in dieses Geheimnis bringt, müssen wir das, was wir erfahren, nicht auch in die Obhut des Vergessens geben, Lord Captain."

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre resmî vakayinamelerden silinen kişi, gerçekten de Seberian von Valancius'muş. Acaba hangi eylem böyle bir adıma neden oldu... Umarım Dargonus'taki kadim kavramsayarın makine ruhu bu gizemi aydınlattığında, öğrendiklerimizi de unutulmaya mahkûm etmek zorunda kalmayız Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre resmî vakayinamelerden silinen kişi, gerçekten de Seberian von Valancius'muş. Acaba hangi eylem böyle bir adıma neden oldu... Umarım Dargonus'taki kadim kavramsayarın makine ruhu bu gizemi aydınlattığında, öğrendiklerimizi de unutulmaya mahkûm etmek zorunda kalmayız Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: 「シベリア・フォン・ヴァランシウスが公式記録から抹消されたのは事実のようです。何があったのか…この謎が古代の思考機械の精神が明らかにしてくれる時、その知見もまた忘れ去られることのないように願っています、艦長様。」
languages.original_text: "It seems that Seberian von Valancius was indeed the one erased from the official chronicles. I wonder what deed prompted such a step... I do hope that, when the machine spirit of the ancient cogitator on Dargonus sheds light on this mystery, we will not have to consign what we learn to oblivion as well, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリア・フォン・ヴァランシウスが公式記録から抹消されたのは事実のようです。何があったのか…この謎が古代の思考機械の精神が明らかにしてくれる時、その知見もまた忘れ去られることのないように願っています、艦長様。」
